revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十五]][[zh:十二月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 15|qq=December 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|741|en|741|qid=Q23597|lt=741|1=741}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|qid=Q2221|lt=January 6|1=January 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} relocated the capital to the Kyōnin Palace in {{ill|Sanyakekoku|ja|山背国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyakekoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山城国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山城国|1=Yamashiro Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q749276}} [[Sagaragun]]; this city remained the capital for three years until the relocation to {{ill|Naniwa-kyō|en|Naniwa-kyō|qid=Q1042338|lt=Naniwa-kyō|1=Naniwa-kyō}}. * {{ill|Tenchō|en|Tenchō|qid=Q1373138|lt=Tenchō|1=Tenchō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|829|en|829|qid=Q30357|lt=829|1=829}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|qid=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} declared the establishment of the {{ill|Sōgei Shuchiin|ja|綜芸種智院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōgei Shuchiin|1=Shugei Shuchi-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11607097}}. * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|qid=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa (Japan)|1=Jōwa}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|839|en|839|qid=Q23874|lt=839|1=839}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|qid=Q2168|lt=January 4|1=January 4}}) – The deputy envoy for {{ill|Japanese missions to Tang China|en|Japanese missions to Tang China|qid=Q262529|lt=Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|1=Japanese missions to Tang China}}, {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|qid=Q1139928|lt=Ono Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}}, who had refused boarding the Kentōshi ship on account of illness, was exiled to {{ill|Oki Province|ja|隠岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oki Province|1=Oki Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11659029}}. * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|949|en|949|qid=Q24352|lt=949|1=949}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) – {{ill|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|en|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|qid=Q1207652|lt=Taira no Masakado}} overthrew a government outpost in {{ill|Kōzuke Province|en|Kōzuke Province|qid=Q1054838|lt=Ueno Province|1=Kōzuke Province}}, seizing the imperial seal and treasury keys, and subdued both Ueno and {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimotsuke Province|1=下野|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1208689}}. Following an oracle from the Great Bodhisattva Hachiman, he proclaimed himself "New Emperor." * {{ill|Kahō|en|Kahō|qid=Q1193280|lt=Kahō|1=Kahō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1095|en|1095|qid=Q19480|lt=1095|1=1095}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – An epidemic prompted an era change from {{ill|Kanji (era)|en|Kanji (era)|qid=Q1193874|lt=Kanchi|1=Kanji (era)}} to {{ill|Kahō|en|Kahō|qid=Q1193280|lt=Kahō|1=Kahō}}. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|January 12|en|January 12|qid=Q2248|lt=January 12|1=January 12}}) – {{ill|Takasugi Shinsaku|en|Takasugi Shinsaku|qid=Q700310|lt=Takasugi Shinsaku|1=Takasugi Shinsaku}} raised troops at Shimonoseki (【功山寺挙兵】), leading to the unification of Chōshū Domain factionalism in support of the overthrow of the bakufu. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) – Former forces of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|旧幕府軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, led by {{ill|Enomoto Takeaki|en|Enomoto Takeaki|qid=Q532959|lt=Enomoto Takeaki|1=Enomoto Takeaki}}, declared their claim to the Ezo territories at Hakodate, founding the {{ill|Republic of Ezo|en|Republic of Ezo|qid=Q714006|lt=Ezo Republic|1=Republic of Ezo}}. == Births == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|qid=Q8432|lt=Bunmei|1=Civilization}} 12nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1481|en|1481|qid=Q6631|lt=1481|1=1481}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshizumi|en|Ashikaga Yoshizumi|qid=Q466281|lt=Ashikaga Yoshizumi|1=Ashikaga Yoshizumi}}, the 11th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (died {{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}}). * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genki|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|qid=Q2912|lt=December 31|1=December 31}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|en|Emperor Go-Yōzei|qid=Q349440|lt=Emperor Gōyangsei|1=Emperor Go-Yōzei}}, the 107th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617|1=1617}}). * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Hachisuga Shisō|ja|蜂須賀至央|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachisuga Shisō|1=Hachisuka Yoshihisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3125473}}, head of the {{ill|Tokushima Domain|en|Tokushima Domain|qid=Q3034557|lt=Tokushima Domain|1=Tokushima Domain}} (died {{ill|1754|en|1754|qid=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1703|en|1703|qid=Q6822|lt=1703|1=1703}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) – {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|qid=Q3132109|lt=Kira Yoshio|1=Kira Yoshinaka}}, a retainer of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} and member of the {{ill|Kōke|ja|高家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōke|1=kōke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1017075}} (born {{ill|1641|en|1641|qid=Q6907|lt=1641|1=1641}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|14|12|16|11|15|1|12|1215|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 15일]] [[ja:12月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月十五]]
[[ar:December 15 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月十五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月十五]] {{wikidata link|Q840846}} [[Category:Days 15 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar December]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
